title: Usean II
content:
{{Top|ga|leg}} {{CelestialBody |image= |name=Usean II |region=[[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}} — Based on corresponding data for [[Usean system/Legends|Usean system]] |sector=[[Tunka sector/Legends|Tunka sector]] |system=[[Usean system/Legends|Usean system]] |coordinates=I-18''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' — Based on corresponding data for [[Usean system/Legends|Usean system]] |xyz= |distance= |suns= |orbited= |position=2''[[The Truce at Bakura Sourcebook]]'' |moons= |routes= |lengthday= |lengthyear= |class=Terrestrial |diameter= |atmosphere= |climate= |gravity= |terrain= |water= |interest= |flora=[[Rocket grass]] |fauna=[[Lrashtash]] |otherlife= |species= |otherspecies= |socialgroup= |language= |government= |population= |demonym= |cities= |imports= |exports= |affiliation= }} {{Quote|Lrashtash
System: Usean II. The lrashtash is an ''[sic]'' herbivore that evolved on the third world where I was stationed.|Personal notes of Wilek Nereus|}} '''Usean II''' was an [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]] [[Planet/Legends|world]] located in the [[Tunka sector/Legends|Tunka sector]]. It was [[Homeworld/Legends|home]] to the [[rocket grass]] [[Plant/Legends|plant]] and the [[Diet/Legends|herbivore]] [[lrashtash]], which had large incisor-like [[Tooth/Legends|teeth]] to frighten predators. At some point, when the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Wilek Nereus]] was stationed on Usean II, he added a set of lrashtash teeth to his dental [[Collector/Legends|collection]]. Later, when Nereus was asked about the origin of the teeth, he claimed they were from an "[[Useani camnzin]]," a predator he invented for his own entertainment and that of his inquirers. ==Description== {{Quote|The lrashtash, however, is an equatorial herbivore. Its huge bluffing teeth are not even used to gnaw down its primary food plants (tall woody stalks locally called 'rocket grass').|Personal notes of Wilek Nereus|}} Usean II was a terrestrial [[Planet/Legends|world]] that occupied the second [[Orbit/Legends|orbital]] position in the [[Usean system/Legends|Usean system]], a part of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories']] [[Tunka sector/Legends|Tunka sector]]. Its [[Plant/Legends|flora]] included the plant the local inhabitants referred to as [[rocket grass]], and the world's equatorial zone was [[Homeworld/Legends|home]] to the [[lrashtash]], a [[Species/Legends|species]] of [[Diet/Legends|herbivores]] that had a set of incisor-like [[Tooth/Legends|teeth]] to frighten away predators. ==History== {{Quote|For my own entertainment and others' enjoyment, I invented a sport species — the Useani camnzin, a mountain dweller that wiped out several herbivorous species in the green valleys of Usean II's equatorial zone.|Personal notes of Wilek Nereus|}} [[File:LrashtashTeeth-TTaBS.png|thumb|right|180px|Wilek Nereus once collected a set of teeth belonging to the Usean II herbivore lrashtash.]] At some point before his [[Death/Legends|death]] in [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]],''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' [[Wilek Nereus]], who eventually became the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Governor/Legends|Governor]] of the [[Wild Space/Legends|Wild Space]]{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}} — Based on corresponding data for [[Bakura system/Legends|Bakura system]] planet [[Bakura/Legends|Bakura]], was stationed on Usean II. There, Nereus obtained a set of lrashtash teeth to add to his dental [[Collector/Legends|collection]]. As soon as he was transferred to the [[Berea system/Legends|Berea system]], in the [[Elrood sector/Legends|Elrood sector]],{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}} visitors began to ask Nereus about the origin of the teeth. For his own entertainment—as well as that of the inquirers—Nereus invented the creature "[[Useani camnzin]]." According to the collector, the large pseudo-incisors belonged to the camnzin, which supposedly was a predator inhabiting Usean II's [[Mountain/Legends|mountains]]. Nereus further claimed that the Useani camnzin was responsible for eliminating several of the herbivore species living in the [[Color/Legends|green]] valleys of that world's equatorial regions. Later, Nereus included a mention of Usean II in an entry of his personal notes dedicated to the lrashtash. ==Behind the scenes== Usean II was first mentioned in ''[[The Truce at Bakura Sourcebook]]'', a [[1996]] sourcebook published for [[West End Games]]' ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]''. The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Usean system, and therefore Usean II, in grid square I-18. ==Sources== *''[[The Truce at Bakura Sourcebook]]'' {{1stm}} *{{CSWECite|II||llrashtash}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Usean II }} [[Category:Planets in the Outer Rim Territories]] [[Category:Terrestrial planets]] [[Category:Tunka sector locations]]
